message:
Improve diagnostic warnings with field names and helpful hints (#5759)

## Summary

This PR enhances diagnostic warnings in TQL evaluation by:

- Adding field names to error messages (e.g., "record does not have
field `X`" instead of generic messages)
- Including helpful hints to guide users toward fixes
- Improving consistency across similar warning scenarios

Changes span three core files:
- **eval_impl.cpp**: Field access errors now include field names; added
null annotation for consistency
- **eval_binary.cpp**: Binary operator and conditional expression
warnings now include helpful hints about null values
- **set.cpp**: Duplicate field drop errors now include the field name

## Test Results

All 632 integration tests pass (3 skipped). 7 test reference files
updated to reflect improved warning text.

## Related Issue

Addresses: TNZ-213

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

<sub>resolves TNZ-213</sub>
